name: Barbecue Beef Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger meat in a pan.
2. Add the barbecue sauce, onion, and brown sugar to the pan. Simmer until combined.
3. Grease a muffin tin.
4. Place one biscuit into each cup of the muffin tin.
5. Pour the hamburger mixture into each cup.
6. Sprinkle cheddar cheese over the top of each cup.
7. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes, or until cooked through.
